about.label: 01 / Me
about.title: A bit about the person behind the flasks
bio: I'm Noel — a software developer who likes turning fuzzy ideas into things that actually run.
I move comfortably between front end and back end, care about details, and enjoy the moment a clunky workflow finally feels effortless.

skills.label: 02 / Skills
skills.title: Suspended in solution
skills.subtitle: Every flask holds a tool I work with, hanging on its own chain.

projects.label: 03 / Selected work
projects.title: Things I've built
projects.subtitle: A handful of experiments, tools and client work.

contact.label: 04 / Contact
contact.title: Let's mix something
contact.subtitle: Tell me about your idea. No email or phone to copy down — just write and hit send.
contact.name: Name
contact.success: Thanks — your message is on its way. I'll be in touch soon.
contact.error: Something went wrong sending that. Please try again in a moment.
contact.invalid: Please fill in your name, a valid email and a message.

footer.note: This corner of the web is still brewing — like everything worth building. ;)
footer.builtWith: Built with Next.js, Matter.js & a lot of caffeine.
